title: French Sausage Stew
description: A hearty French-inspired stew made with juicy sausage and a tangy twist.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced onion and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the sliced mushrooms and cook until they release their liquid and start to brown, about 5 minutes.
Add the French sausage and cook, breaking it up with a spoon, until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the stew mix, tomato paste, red wine, and beef broth. Stir to combine.
Bring the stew to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Stir in the tangy BBQ sauce and season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
